roles.description: Default audience identity with public engagement access.
Content or product contributor with owned assets and campaign activity.
Operator with release, moderation, and system management responsibility.
External collaborator, sponsor, vendor, or distribution contact.
Automation identity for scheduled, generated, or integration-driven events.

rules: Identity ownership stays separate from public display names.
Role changes must include actor, reason, timestamp, and previous role.
System identities must identify the automation source.
